title: Only one row updated in data merge
symptom: When merging data, only one row is updated instead of all relevant rows. This leads to incomplete data updates.
applies_when: Using a node to merge data
root_cause: The last node in the workflow is not configured to match records by their ID, causing it to only update the first matching record instead of all relevant records.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the last node in your workflow.
Ensure that the node is set to match records by ID.
Save the changes and re-run the workflow.
agent_instruction: Update the last node to match records by ID to ensure all rows are updated.
